confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all three throws with proper hand switching. Suture placement appears accurate through both marks. No visible penalties observed. Task appears complete with secure knot formation.
cannot_determine: Exact suture cut completion - video ends before showing final suture trimming
Precise measurement of any minor suture deviations due to camera angle
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion time of 75 seconds. Proper surgeon's knot formation followed by alternating single throws with correct hand switching throughout.
strengths: Rapid completion time well within expert range
Perfect hand switching sequence between all throws
Clean knot formation with appropriate tension
Accurate suture placement through both marks
improvement_suggestions: Video cuts off before showing final suture trimming which would be required for complete task
